cmd: bash -c cmake -B agent_space/mhc_build_fat -S projects/mHC.cu/src/src/csrc -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES="gfx90a;gfx1100" -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmake --build agent_space/mhc_build_fat --target test_rmsnorm test_sinkhorn_knopp test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul -j8 2>&1 | grep -iE "error:|Built target" | grep -v nodiscard

bash -c 
PASS=0; FAIL=0
for t in test_rmsnorm test_rmsnorm_backward test_sinkhorn_knopp test_mhc_layer \
         test_stream_ops test_stream_ops_backward test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul \
         test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul_backward; do
  echo "=== $t ==="
  if ./$t; then
    echo "PASS: $t"
    PASS=$((PASS+1))
  else
    echo "FAIL: $t (rc=$?)"
    FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
  fi
done
echo ""
echo "Results: $PASS PASS, $FAIL FAIL"

bash -c 
BUILD=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/mhc-validate/build
PASS=0; FAIL=0
for t in test_rmsnorm test_rmsnorm_backward test_sinkhorn_knopp test_mhc_layer \
         test_stream_ops test_stream_ops_backward test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul \
         test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul_backward; do
  $BUILD/$t > /dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?
  if [ $rc -eq 0 ]; then PASS=$((PASS+1)); else FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); fi
done
echo "$PASS PASS $FAIL FAIL"

bash -c 
TESTS="test_rmsnorm test_rmsnorm_backward test_sinkhorn_knopp test_mhc_layer test_stream_ops test_stream_ops_backward test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul_backward"
PASS=0; FAIL=0
for t in $TESTS; do
    echo "=== $t ==="
    if HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 ./$t 2>&1; then
        echo "PASS: $t"
        PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $t (rc=$?)"
        FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
    echo ""
done
echo "Results: $PASS PASS, $FAIL FAIL"

bash -c 
PASS=0; FAIL=0
for t in test_rmsnorm test_rmsnorm_backward test_sinkhorn_knopp test_mhc_layer test_stream_ops test_stream_ops_backward test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul_backward; do
    echo "=== $t ==="
    if HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 /var/lib/jenkins/moat/build-mhc-gfx1100/$t 2>&1; then
        echo "PASS: $t"
        PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
        echo "FAIL: $t (rc=$?)"
        FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
    echo ''
done
echo "Results: $PASS PASS, $FAIL FAIL"

bash -c 
ROCM="B:/develop/TheRock/external-builds/pytorch/.venv/Lib/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel"
CLANG="$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin/clang++.exe"
BUILD="B:/develop/moat/projects/mHC.cu/build_gfx1201"
SRC="B:/develop/moat/projects/mHC.cu/src/src/csrc"

export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PATH="$ROCM/bin:$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin:$PATH"

cmake -B "$BUILD" -S "$SRC" \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES="gfx1201" \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$ROCM" \
  2>&1
echo "CMake exit: $?"

bash -c 
ROCM="B:/develop/TheRock/external-builds/pytorch/.venv/Lib/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel"
CLANG="$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin/clang++.exe"
BUILD="B:/develop/moat/projects/mHC.cu/build_gfx1201"
SRC="B:/develop/moat/projects/mHC.cu/src/src/csrc"

export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PATH="$ROCM/bin:$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin:$PATH"

# Remove old cmake cache from failed attempt
rm -rf "$BUILD/CMakeCache.txt" "$BUILD/CMakeFiles"

cmake -B "$BUILD" -S "$SRC" \
  -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES="gfx1201" \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER="$CLANG" \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="$ROCM" \
  2>&1
echo "CMake configure exit: $?"

BUILD="B:/develop/moat/projects/mHC.cu/build_gfx1201"

export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
export PATH="$ROCM_CORE/bin:$ROCM/bin:$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin:$PATH"

PASS=0; FAIL=0
for t in test_rmsnorm test_rmsnorm_backward test_sinkhorn_knopp test_mhc_layer \
         test_stream_ops test_stream_ops_backward test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul \
         test_fused_rmsnorm_matmul_backward; do

    if [ $rc -eq 0 ]; then PASS=$((PASS+1)); else FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); fi
done
